title: Dish and Dash & Coastal Bites: Feeding Mossel Bay with flavour and heart
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Mossel Bay locals are...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Mossel Bay locals are spoiled for choice when it comes to good food - and Dish and Dash together with Coastal Bites are making sure no one goes hungry.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Mossel Bay locals are spoiled for choice when it comes to good food - and Dish and Dash together with Coastal Bites are making sure no one goes hungry."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At Dish and Dash, you’ll find hearty, home-style cooked meals that taste just like mom used to make it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Freshly prepared with care, wholesome, and ready for you to dish and weigh, it’s the perfect option for those with busy lifestyles.","html":"Freshly prepared with care, wholesome, and ready for you to dish and weigh, it’s the perfect option for those with busy lifestyles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re looking to feed the family after a long day, grab something tasty for your office lunch, or simply enjoy a comforting dinner without the effort, Dish and Dash has you covered.","html":"Whether you’re looking to feed the family after a long day, grab something tasty for your office lunch, or simply enjoy a comforting dinner without the effort, Dish and Dash has you covered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To make things even more convenient, delivery is available straight to your door - bringing warmth and flavour wherever you are.","html":"To make things even more convenient, delivery is available straight to your door - bringing warmth and flavour wherever you are."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"When your taste buds call for something quick, bold, and packed with flavour, Coastal Bites is the place to go."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From juicy smash burgers and russians with golden chips, to crispy fish and chips fresh from the fryer, every meal is made to order and guaranteed to satisfy both cravings and appetites.","html":"From juicy smash burgers and russians with golden chips, to crispy fish and chips fresh from the fryer, every meal is made to order and guaranteed to satisfy both cravings and appetites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together, Dish and Dash and Coastal Bites bring the best of both worlds to Mossel Bay - wholesome plates of comfort food for when you need a home-cooked touch, and fast, flavourful takeaways for those on the go.","html":"Together, Dish and Dash and Coastal Bites bring the best of both worlds to Mossel Bay - wholesome plates of comfort food for when you need a home-cooked touch, and fast, flavourful takeaways for those on the go."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It’s food made with care, for every taste and every occasion.","html":"It’s food made with care, for every taste and every occasion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Come and experience the flavour for yourself - there’s something for everyone at Dish and Dash & Coastal Bites. From homestyle meals to takeaways - we’ve got you covered!","html":"Come and experience the flavour for yourself - there’s something for everyone at Dish and Dash & Coastal Bites. From homestyle meals to takeaways - we’ve got you covered!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit us at Shop 7, Bayview Plaza c/o Louis Fourie Rd and Garret Str or contact us on 071 611 2227 for convenient delivery.","html":"Visit us at Shop 7, Bayview Plaza c/o Louis Fourie Rd and Garret Str or contact us on 071 611 2227 for convenient delivery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
